title: Verify release PR creation via @kody release
description: The @kody release command verification is already complete. Dry-run results confirm: version bump to 1.1.0 (minor), release/v1.1.0 branch creation, kody:release label, and changelog grouping by type all pass. The release process correctly enforces CI gate - blocked by pre-existing test failure in tests/int/api.int.spec.ts (SQL parameter $1 issue), which is unrelated to the release process itself.
